screens.name: home
screens.prompt: Redesign with dark theme: near-black #0a0a0f background with floating geometric shapes (circles, triangles, hexagons) as subtle background decoration with very low opacity. Electric indigo #6366f1 glow effects. Hero section with large bold headline, a single text input for the user's research goal, and a CTA button. Top nav with logo left, minimal links right. Background shapes should feel ambient and technical, not decorative. Desktop layout.

screens.name: question-card
screens.prompt: Dark theme: #0a0a0f background, geometric shapes, indigo accent, adaptive question with multiple choice options

screens.name: confirmation
screens.prompt: Dark theme: #0a0a0f background, geometric shapes, indigo accent. Shows which autoresearch components apply with glowing component badges, plain-language description, confirm CTA.

screens.name: output
screens.prompt: Dark theme: #0a0a0f background, geometric shapes, indigo accent. Numbered guide steps in dark panel cards with step numbers as glowing indigo circles. LLM prompt in a dark code-block with copy button. Output looks premium and editorial.

screens.name: simulation-example-section
screens.prompt: Simulation example section for auto-leverage output page. Dark theme #0a0a0f, geometric background shapes, indigo accent. Three panels side by side (or stacked on mobile): (1) Example Data — small table with 4-5 rows of sample dataset relevant to user's use case (e.g. NBA stats). (2) Example Strategy — 3 bullet points showing what autoresearch agent would try: starting hyperparams, stopping rule, win condition. (3) Example Metrics — 3 metric cards each showing current value with arrow pointing to target value, with a small sparkline chart. Section header: 'See how it runs'. Premium, editorial feel. Desktop.

screens.name: mobile-version-of-auto-leverage-home-pag
screens.prompt: Mobile version of auto-leverage home page. Dark theme #0a0a0f screen — Dark theme #0a0a0f, geometric shapes background at low opacity, indigo accent. Single column layout: logo top, bold headline, subtitle, full-width text input for research goal, full-width CTA button. Thumb-friendly — large tap targets, generous padding. 390px wide mobile viewport.

screens.name: auto-leverage-output-page
screens.prompt: auto-leverage output page, mobile 390px. Dark #0a0a0f, indigo accent. Stacked: numbered guide steps in dark cards with glowing step circles, LLM prompt code block with copy button, simulation section with data table and metric cards below.

screens.name: landing
screens.prompt: phone-entry: auto-leverage 390px mobile landing. Dark #0a0a0f, geometric shape accents, indigo glow. Stacked: logo, bold headline 'Optimize your AI research runs', subtitle, full-width text input, full-width indigo CTA, bottom tagline. Thumb-friendly.

styleConfig.aestheticAnchor: dark, creative, editorial — geometric shape accents in background, glowing subtle gradients, confident and technical but still approachable
styleConfig.brandReference: Linear meets Perplexity AI — dark surfaces, sharp typography, ambient glow, professional but with personality
styleConfig.colorPalette: near-black #0a0a0f background, midnight blue-purple #1a1a2e panels, electric indigo #6366f1 primary accent, violet #7c3aed secondary, soft white #f1f5f9 text, muted slate #94a3b8 secondary text
styleConfig.typography: Inter for UI, Geist Mono for code blocks
styleConfig.notes: Guided wizard for non-technical researchers. Users should feel calm and confident. Generous whitespace, clear hierarchy, WCAG AA contrast required.
